description: Configure a real-time LSL stream of filtered EEG data using the playback recording 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' (located in Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/). Apply a 60 Hz Notch filter and a 1-50 Hz Bandpass filter to the session. Establish an LSL stream named 'NeuroPrep_Stream' for EEG data, ensuring the transmitted data is filtered. Save a screenshot of the active configuration to /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/lsl_filtered_setup.png.
